name: qpet
description: Create your own 3D chibi desktop pet from a few words or a selfie.

interface.shortDescription: Make a 3D chibi pet from words or a selfie.
interface.longDescription: Describe a pet or add a selfie. Qpet shows three different looks, remembers the one you choose, and turns it into an animated desktop pet. No design experience is needed.
capabilities: Turn a selfie into a chibi pet
defaultPrompt: Make a 3D chibi pet from my idea.
Turn my attached selfie into a chibi version of me.
Show me three different Qpet styles to choose from.
